title: Brain Quest
description: Quick brain teasers and learning challenges. Learn while you play!

title: Word Scramble
description: Unscramble the letters before the timer runs out. Levels, lives and combos!

title: Math Blast
description: Solve quick math problems against the clock. Pick your difficulty and beat your best!

title: Spelling Bee
description: Listen to the word and type it correctly. Hear it again, use hints, beat the timer!
